title: Aggregate log levels into a metric
prompt_md:
Counting log lines by level is the simplest kind of **metric**.

Write `count_levels(lines)` that takes a list of log lines (each like `"[INFO] message"`) and returns a dict mapping each level to how many times it appeared. Reuse the same bracket-parsing logic from the previous exercise; lines with no bracket count under `"UNKNOWN"`.
hints: Write a small helper that extracts the level from one line (or define parse_level again inside the function).
Loop over lines, get each level, and use `counts[level] = counts.get(level, 0) + 1`.
